title: 10 Places Pride Hides in a Godly Man
caption:
Pride doesn't announce itself. It wears the clothes of confidence, competence, and theological conviction.

The man who reacts to feedback like it's an attack. The prayer performed for the room. The unsolicited advice. The grudge that's still running. The failure story told to sound deep, not to be honest.

And deeper: the accountability he answers but never actually invites. The doctrine he uses to win arguments. The help he won't ask for. The apology that never quite admits anything. The eye he keeps on his brother's discipline — not for inspiration, but to keep score.

"God opposes the proud but shows favor to the humble." — James 4:6

The man who can spot his own pride is already halfway out of its grip. Take a look.

Save this and send it to one honest man.

#faith #humility #christianmen #pride #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #james4 #christianity
